title: Harmonograph Lab
description: A multi-source generative-art studio: layer harmonographs, spirographs, roses, Lissajous, superformula, eight strange attractors & L-system fractals (incl. branching plants) with color/blend/glow/kaleidoscope. Render attractors as luminous DENSITY-FIELD nebulae (millions of points splatted into a tone-mapped histogram), morph them live, pulse and beat-reseed to your mic, and export seamless looping GIF/WebM (from-scratch GIF encoder) or high-res PNG/SVG. Shareable by URL.
